title: Spike Spencer is still waiting on Evangelion 333
display_title: Spike Spencer is still waiting on Evangelion 333
wikitext:
[]: Spike Spencer is still waiting on Evangelion 3.33             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Jan 04, 2015 4:22 pm A nice little vine posted by his wife on Twitter. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Ha figured out how to post tweets!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 04, 2015 4:36 pm Spike's such a goofball. Fingers crossed on some actual news within Winter or Spring quarter...

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:23 pm I still think it is coming in Feberary, one year after they initially announced it. Also this kinda clues us in that Spike is done his lines, but I think that's was something everyone already knew. What could Khara and Funi still be waiting on?

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:33 pm Anno's Final okay? Another theatrical release to re-gauge the audience reactions?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:38 pm Good points, but what would Final's okay have to do with the English release of 3.33? Unless I don't see the point which is completely possible. Also Funi has been saying since September they will have a release date for us. But now it's 2015.... Let's hope for it?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:44 pm No way it comes in February, I think funi has already announced its release slate for that month. March could be possible however.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:45 pm They are delaying 3.33 so that it can be released in the US on the same day that the world-wide release of the last film is made, which has been completed and also dubbed and subbed in complete secrecy for release on the day the expo series ends. Well, I could be wrong, I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Jan 04, 2015 5:50 pm That would then allow them to fallback on their original plan of a duel 3.0 and Final release... It all makes sense now. Just kidding. Hui I didnt know that at all, thanks. Can't believe it has now been delayed for over a year. Since I wasnt into Evangelion/didn't know about anime at the start of 2014, at this time last year how hype was it for the screening? Edit- Like on a scale of 1 to hype... How hype was it?

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Sun Jan 04, 2015 6:27 pm Ray wrote: Another theatrical release to re-gauge the audience reactions?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jan 04, 2015 6:32 pm To answer the hype question, I was a 10, others may vary. I had the privlage of getting lost in a city I barely knew at the time.... But I got to the theatre on time so that's all that mattered to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Jan 05, 2015 9:19 am Baka Funimation

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jan 05, 2015 9:25 am I wonder if he's secretly got a fansubbed version of the film and reads all of Shinji's lines aloud for him

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Jan 05, 2015 10:00 am pwhodges wrote: They are delaying 3.33 so that it can be released in the US on the same day that the world-wide release of the last film is made, which has been completed and also dubbed and subbed in complete secrecy for release on the day the expo series ends. Well, I could be wrong, I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jan 05, 2015 1:45 pm No, the fabric of reality wouldn't support that much distortion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Jan 05, 2015 1:51 pm Well it did support Evangelion and more in the first place soo maybe. Also it isn't above the master Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jan 05, 2015 1:52 pm I was talking about the Half-Life 3 being confirmed part.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Jan 05, 2015 1:57 pm ElMariachi wrote: I was talking about the Half-Life 3 being confirmed part.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Jan 05, 2015 3:14 pm Jimbob wrote: If that's the case it's never coming out. Like I said in the other thread they will NEVER get a Japanese like reaction from an American audience.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jan 05, 2015 3:27 pm I would really like to see a statement from Funimation, to see what happened that this release went so wrong. Spencer's teasing is funny, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Tue Jan 06, 2015 1:13 am Shinji's VA has a sense of humor?! not muh Shinji
